brand.name: MERIT Demo Portal
brand.tagline: A clean hello-world consumer for MERIT Agent Skills and MERIT Prod.
brand.description: MERIT Demo shows how a public consumer can use the free skills, local-first play surfaces, and production MERIT provider routes without exposing provider internals.

audience: First-time MERIT users and subscriber operators

providers.name: Workbench
providers.summary: Free MERIT play shell using published package pins from MERIT Prod.

providers.name: Journal
providers.summary: Local-first journal demo with cloud backup hooks when a subscriber upgrades.

providers.name: AMA
providers.summary: Question, voting, and leaderboard demo for community interaction.

providers.name: MeritSubs
providers.summary: Production subscription and entitlement route for the merit-demo consumer.

notes: This repo is the public demo consumer; paid provider code stays behind MERIT Prod.
New users can clone merit-agent-skills, run the CLI, and compare their result with this Portal.
Use public promo or affiliate codes only; never put secrets in this static folder.
